# Loopora (InterviewLoop) — LLM Developer & Crawler Guide

Loopora is an SEO-optimized interview preparation SaaS with a hand-drawn notebook/sketchbook aesthetic. It organizes Q&As into categories (folders) and questions, providing model written answers and inline switchable video explanations.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router, dynamic layouts)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4, custom HSL design variables
- **Data:** MongoDB Atlas, Mongoose ODM
- **Auth:** NextAuth.js v5 (Credentials + RBAC)
- **Validation:** Zod
- **Typography:** Kalam (headings) + Patrick Hand (body)

## Key Folder Paths
- `src/app/(public)/` — Public-facing pages (landing, folders library, dynamic categories, solutions view, `/suggest`, `/search`, `/profile`)
- `src/app/(admin)/admin/` — Content management system (CMS) dashboard, audit logs, feature flags, bulk import
- `src/app/api/` — API handlers (rate-limited auth, suggestions, bulk-import, flags)
- `src/lib/db/` — Database connection singleton and schemas (User, Category, Question, FeatureFlag, AuditLog, Suggestion, Resume, ResumeAnalysis)
- `src/lib/video/` — `parseVideoUrl` declarative video URL parser (platform registry: YouTube, YouTube Shorts, Vimeo, Loom, Google Drive, Instagram posts/Reels/TV, direct files) with `getEmbedUrl` wrapper
- `src/components/ui/` — Wobbly hand-drawn aesthetic base components (Button, Card, Input, Accordion, Skeleton, Select, Toggle)

## Public Routes
- `/` — Cinematic landing page
- `/interview` — Category/folder library
- `/interview/[categorySlug]` — Questions in a category
- `/interview/[categorySlug]/[questionSlug]` — Solution view with video player + AI answers
- `/search` — Full-text search
- `/suggest` — Submit a question suggestion (POSTs to `/api/suggestions`)
- `/privacy`, `/terms`, `/cookies` — Legal pages
- `/profile` — Resume management + folder personalization (auth required)
- `/login`, `/signup` — Auth (excluded from indexing)
- `/admin/*` — CMS (admin/editor only, excluded from indexing)

## Database Models

### Category Schema
- `name` (String, required)
- `slug` (String, required, unique)
- `type` (String, required: "hr" | "technical" | "behavioral" | "situational" | "case-study")
- `description` (String)
- `icon` (String, e.g. "code", "user")
- `order` (Number, default 0)
- `questionCount` (Number, default 0)
- `isPublished` (Boolean, default true)

### Question Schema
- `category` (ObjectId -> Category, required)
- `slug` (String, required, unique)
- `question` (String, required)
- `answer` (Object: short, detailed [HTML], example)
- `videos` (Array of VideoInput: label, url, order)
- `difficulty` (Enum: "easy", "medium", "hard", default "medium")
- `frequencyRank` (Number, default 0)
- `tags` (Array of String)
- `isPremium` (Boolean, default false)
- `isPublished` (Boolean, default true)

## Development Guidelines
1. **RBAC Guarding:** Ensure `requireRole(['admin'])` protects all admin pages and mutating API endpoints.
2. **Typecheck & Linting:** Keep builds cleanly typed (no arbitrary `any` without safety assertions) and verify compile status before git check-ins.
3. **Wobbly Aesthetic:** Wrap visual panels inside `<Card decoration="tape">` or use `wobbly-sm`/`wobbly-md` border classes.
